title: Carlos Estrada

infobox.value: This biographical article related to a football forward from Colombia is a [stub](/wiki/Wikipedia:Stub "Wikipedia:Stub"). You can help Wikipedia by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Carlos_Estrada&action=edit).

infobox.key: Carlos Enrique "La Gambeta" (The Dribble) Estrada Mosquera
infobox.value: (born 1 November 1961) is a Colombian [football](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") [forward](/wiki/Forward_(association_football) "Forward (association football)") who played for [Colombia](/wiki/Colombia_national_football_team "Colombia national football team") in the [1990 FIFA World Cup](/wiki/1990_FIFA_World_Cup "1990 FIFA World Cup").[[1]](#cite_note-1) He also played for [Millonarios Fútbol Club](/wiki/Millonarios_F%C3%BAtbol_Club "Millonarios Fútbol Club").

["1990 FIFA World Cup Italy"](https://web.archive.org/web/20111220014044/http://www.fifa.com/worldcup/archive/edition%3D76/teams/team%3D43926.html). Archived from [the original](https://www.fifa.com/worldcup/archive/edition=76/teams/team=43926.html) on 20 December 2011. Retrieved 1 October 2011

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Colombian football forward (born 1961)

For the Colombian footballer, see [Carlos Estrada (footballer, born 1997)](/wiki/Carlos_Estrada_(footballer,_born_1997) "Carlos Estrada (footballer, born 1997)").

**Carlos Enrique "La Gambeta" (The Dribble) Estrada Mosquera** (born 1 November 1961) is a Colombian [football](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") [forward](/wiki/Forward_(association_football) "Forward (association football)") who played for [Colombia](/wiki/Colombia_national_football_team "Colombia national football team") in the [1990 FIFA World Cup](/wiki/1990_FIFA_World_Cup "1990 FIFA World Cup").[[1]](#cite_note-1) He also played for [Millonarios Fútbol Club](/wiki/Millonarios_F%C3%BAtbol_Club "Millonarios Fútbol Club").

Archived from [the original](https://www.fifa.com/worldcup/archive/edition=76/teams/team=43926.html) on 20 December 2011. Retrieved 1 October 2011
